question: What is the main focus of the image? Select from the following options: (A) A person on stage playing guitar. (B) A black and white photo of a band on stage. (C) A group of musicians playing different instruments. (D) A group of people playing instruments.
gold_answer: A group of musicians playing different instruments
answer_choices: A person on stage playing guitar
